guide.title: Prollio Dashboard Guide
guide.description:
This guide will walk you through everything you need to get started with the Prollio platform — from connecting your Telegram channel, setting up pricing, and managing events, to sending messages and tracking your subscribers.

Whether you're a coach, consultant, educator, or content expert, this dashboard is your central hub to monetize your knowledge and deliver exclusive value to your community.

connect_channel.title: Connect Your Telegram Channel to Prollio
connect_channel.step3: Step 3. Verify that your channel is connected

create_bot.title: Create Your Telegram Bot with BotFather

Go to your channel → Tap the channel nam: Go to your channel → Tap the channel name → Open
Tap Add Admin → Search for @ProllioBot →: Tap “Add Admin” → Search for @ProllioBot → Select it → Grant the necessary permissions → Tap “Done”
Return to the Prollio Dashboard → Go to: Return to the Prollio Dashboard → Go to the “Channels” page — if the bot was added correctly, your channel will automatically appear in the list
Send /newbot and follow the instructions: Send /newbot and follow the instructions to set a name and username for your bot. Your bot username must end with bot (e.g., MyAwesomeBot).
After creating the bot, BotFather will s: After creating the bot, BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy this token — you’ll need it to connect your bot to Prollio.

general.q1: What is Prollio, and what is it for?
general.a1: Prollio is a web platform (prollio.ai) where you can create your personal Dashboard, manage your content, monetize it, post informational materials and videos, organize and hold events, and connect a messenger app to manage everything.
general.a2: The Dashboard is your personal page in Prollio. It is initially created in a 'passive' state (inactive), then immediately after payment it becomes 'active', and you can use all Dashboard features according to your selected plan.
general.q3: How do I start using Prollio?
general.a3:
You submit an Application to create a Dashboard and use the services.
Prollio reviews the Application.
If approved, a link is sent to your email.
You follow the link, create a password, and enter your Dashboard.
After payment, the Dashboard becomes active.
general.q4: Can I stop using the services at any time?
general.a4: Yes. You can stop using the services at any time without penalties or fines. However, the amount already paid is non-refundable, and access may continue for the remaining period of the paid time.
general.q5: Who should I contact if I have a question?
general.a5: You can write an email to wecare@prollio.ai.

application.q1: Is there a fee to submit an Application?
application.a1: No. There is no fee for reviewing the Application.
application.q2: What happens after submitting the Application?
application.a2: The Application review phase begins. During this time, Prollio reviews the data you provided (including its authenticity) and analyzes the activity you plan to conduct with the Dashboard.
application.a3: Yes, if verification of data is needed, additional information and documents may be requested.
application.q4: When will I know if my Application is approved?
application.a4: An email regarding approval or rejection is sent within 24 hours to the email provided in the Application.
application.q5: Why might my Application be rejected?
application.a5: If during the review it is determined that your activity does not currently meet the established criteria or there are circumstances that raise suspicion that the Dashboard could be used for purposes or situations that violate the terms and/or Armenian legislation.
application.q6: How do I access the Dashboard from the approval email?
application.a6: The email contains a link. By following the link, you create a password and enter your personal Dashboard. The Dashboard will remain passive until the payment is made.
application.q7: When does the Dashboard become active?
application.a7: The Dashboard becomes active immediately after payment.

payments.q1: How do I make a payment for services?
payments.a1:
The service fee is paid according to the selected pricing plan.
Payment is made in a single installment for one year.
Payments can be made via any payment method.
payments.a2: Yes, we have a basic 30-day plan which is free. Within this plan, you can connect one channel and hold one event. This is a trial period to get familiar with the platform and see if the service suits you. During this time, you only pay the commission from generated sales.
payments.a3: No, the service fee is non-refundable.
payments.q4: Where can I see pricing plans?
payments.a5: The Commission is the amount paid to Prollio from the income earned through entrepreneurial activity conducted via the Dashboard. The amount and payment procedure depend on the selected pricing plan.
payments.q6: How are event participation payments made?
payments.a6: Event participants make payments through an electronic payment terminal linked to the messenger app, owned by 'PROLLIO' LLC.
payments.q7: When do I receive my funds (payments to my bank)?
payments.a7: Funds are transferred twice a month — on the 1st and 15th of the accounting month — automatically to the bank account linked to the platform.
payments.q8: What happens if I don’t pay or underpay?
payments.a8: Prollio sends a notification, and the payment must be made within 1 business day following the notification. If the payment is still not made, Prollio suspends the services and access.
payments.q9: What happens if I don’t pay within 30 days?
payments.a9: If the corresponding payment is not made within 30 days, the passive Dashboard is automatically deleted. This does not mean you cannot submit a new Application.

content.a1:
You confirm and guarantee that your content:
- Does not violate the terms, applicable legislation, or third-party rights (e.g., copyright)
- Does not contain discrimination based on gender, race, religion, or other beliefs
- Does not promote violence, extremist activity, drug/psychoactive substance use or distribution, or other prohibited actions
- Is not defamatory, offensive, or disparaging
You can review the full provisions here: https://prollio.ai/terms.
content.q2: What happens if these rules are violated?
content.a2: In case of violation, Prollio may suspend services and Dashboard access without prior notice. Any amounts paid for the period in question are non-refundable.
content.q3: Is Prollio responsible for issues between me and my channel’s buyers?
content.a3: Prollio does not participate in the relationship between you and event participants and is not responsible for services provided, goods delivered, content, organized events, their legality, financial losses if events do not occur, or similar matters. However, we have a public offer, which also applies between you and participants.
content.q4: If I organize an event but it doesn’t happen, who refunds the already paid amounts?
content.a4: If the event generated through the Dashboard does not occur, you are responsible for refunding any amounts already paid by participants. If the accounting date is still far, you may need to do this from your own funds until the received amounts are transferred to you on the accounting date.
content.q5: Can Prollio monitor my transactions or content?
content.a5: Prollio has the right to monitor transactions conducted via the Dashboard, the content/legal compliance of events, and the information in the messenger linked to the Dashboard. If suspicious or illegal content is detected, our team may take measures specified in the agreement.
